CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Continued To Feb-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Continued To Nov-03-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
LEONOR NOGUEZ-WARD, ESQ., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415-554-3854 FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES. MATTER WAS SET FOR HEARING AT 9:30AM.
THE COURT MADE AN EFFORT TO LOCATE THE PLAINTIFF BY CONTACTING DEPARTMENTS 206, 302 AND 501 SINCE THE MOTION HAD BEEN TRANSFERRED FROM THOSE DEPARTMENTS TO 504. THE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT LOCATED AND DID NOT APPEAR IN DEPARTMENT 504 FOR THE MOTION. AT 10AM THE COURT HEARD THE MOTION ON THE RECORD.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FAILED TO STATE FACTS SUFFICIENT AGAINST THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. JUDGEMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED FORMS OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT. AT 10:15AM, THE COURT WAS IN RECESS. THE PLAINTIFF HAD STILL NOT APPEARED.
JUDGE: JOHN STEPHEN GRAHAM, VISITING JUDGE, REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR: 5162 (504/JSG)
